---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for pg_rolequota
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is (e.g. "I want to enforce quotas per schema instead of per role").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**

**Additional context**
- Which scanner mode(s) would this affect? (`enterprise_db`, `shared_hosting`, or both)
- Any related issues or discussions?

**For contributors**
If you plan to implement this, please note that you must follow [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/<org>/pg_rolequota/blob/main/AGENTS.md) — every new or modified implementation file requires automated tests.
